title: rubroshorea albida
side_effects: Rubroshorea albida can have side effects if used improperly, such as allergic reactions, including hives and itching, as well as gastrointestinal issues like nausea and diarrhea. In severe cases, improper use can lead to liver damage, kidney problems, and even respiratory failure. Additionally, individuals with pre-existing conditions, such as high blood pressure or diabetes, may experience exacerbated symptoms, including rapid heartbeat and increased blood sugar levels. Furthermore, overconsumption of the plant can cause dizziness, confusion, and even seizures in rare instances.
